thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is still declining (-0.5000 -> -0.5000 -> -0.5000), so stay in iterate_existing mode. ETH channel shortbias remains the best-performing family visible in the current set because its transfer variant at least produced QScore -0.011 with 20 trades, while the newer candidates all hard-failed on low trade count. Follow the lesson directly: assume entry logic is anti-correlated and reframe the setup around failed bullish continuation / channel rejection rather than threshold-tuning the existing trigger. Test one lever per variant only: invert the trigger logic, require stronger pre-short trend confirmation, or cut the trade immediately on failed downside follow-through.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 20, and max_drawdown_pct <= 10.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 0.95, or max_drawdown_pct > 12.0.
